steps.name: Test Case: pXEww2
steps.statusMessage:
- API rejected schema-compliant request

    Valid data should have been accepted
    Expected: 2xx

- Undocumented HTTP status code

    Received: 401
    Documented: 200, 400, 404, 500

[401] Unauthorized:

    `{ "statusCode": 401, "message": "Access denied due to invalid subscription key. Make sure to provide a valid key for an active subscription." }`

Reproduce with:

    curl -X PUT -H 'Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"indexList": [0]}' 'https://api.platform.pagopa.it/fdr-psp/service/v1/psps/88888888888/fdrs/2026-07-0188888888888-0001/payments/del?subscription-key=%5BFiltered%5D'
